description_long: This is a structured white leather handbag with a rectangular body and a single short handle attached by gold hardware. The front flap features a central vertical navy and red stripe, adorned with a prominent gold chain accent and a gold clasp closure. A decorative tricolor ribbon in red, white, and blue is tied to one handle ring, adding a playful and elegant touch. The back of the bag mirrors the front's stripe and chain motif but lacks the clasp and ribbon. The edges are neatly piped in black, and the overall finish is sleek and polished. The bag is compact, likely designed for carrying personal essentials in urban settings.
description: A structured white leather handbag with gold hardware, a navy-red stripe, and a decorative tricolor ribbon. Features a gold chain accent and a short handle for hand carrying.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold clasp, navy-red stripe, gold chain, and tricolor ribbon tied to the handle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bag's depth, the handle attachment, and the ribbon's drape.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the navy-red stripe and gold chain accent, without the clasp or ribbon.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the clean side profile and handle attachment, with no ribbon visible.
attribute_strap_type: Single short handle, non-adjustable, attached with gold hardware rings at each end.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Gold clasp closure located at the center of the front flap.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold chain accent on the front and back, tricolor (red, white, blue) ribbon tied to the handle, gold hardware.
attribute_pattern: Vertical navy and red stripe on a white background; otherwise plain.
